Dear student,

Thank you for your email and for sharing your concerns. We have received a high volume of emails regarding the issues you have mentioned and we want to reassure you that we are looking into your concerns as a matter of urgency.

Thank you for your patience as we work hard to provide you with a response as soon as we can.

Best wishes,

RUSU
